zh.Alton, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾阿頓
zh.Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England: 英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival於1326年8月23日出生在英國斯塔福爾阿頓時，他的父親Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival34歲，母親Joan de Verdun23歲。他和Thomasine Dagworth至少有1個女兒。他去世於1383年4月20日在西班牙享年56歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

zh-hans.Alton, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾阿頓
zh-hans.Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England: 英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival于1326年8月23日出生在英国斯塔福爾阿頓时，他的父亲Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival34岁，母亲Joan de Verdun23岁。他和Thomasine Dagworth至少有1个女儿。他去世于1383年4月20日在西班牙享年56岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾沃可索普。

nameMeanings.name: Furnival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman: locative name from Fourneville (Calvados), Fournival in Saint-Just-en-Chaussée (Oise), or Fournival in Saint-Julien-sur-Sarthe (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival was born on 23 August 1326, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, his father, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, was 34 and his mother, Joan de Verdun, was 23. He had at least 1 daughter with Thomasine Dagworth. He died on 20 April 1383, in Spain, at the age of 56, and was buried in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival est né le 23 août 1326, à Alton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan de Verdun, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Thomasine Dagworth. Il est décédé le 20 avril 1383, à Espagne, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival am 23. August 1326 in Alton, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival 34 und seine Mutter Joan de Verdun 23. Er hatte mit Thomasine Dagworth mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. April 1383 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Spanien und wurde in Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival è nato il il 23 agosto 1326 nel Alton, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Verdun, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Thomasine Dagworth. Morì il 20 aprile 1383, nel Spagna, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.Alton, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトン
ja.Sheffield, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアシェフィールド
ja.Worksop, Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップ
ja.lifeSummary: William Furnival 4th Baron Furnivalが1326年8月23日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnivalは34歳，母Joan de Verdunは23歳であった。彼はThomasine Dagworthとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1383年4月20日にスペインで56歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオルクソップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival(이)가 1326년 8월 23일 영국 스태퍼드실르 알턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Verdun(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Thomasine Dagworth(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1383년 4월 20일 스페인에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 워크소프에 묻혔다.

mn.23 August 1326–20 April 1383: 1326 оны Наймдугаар сарын 23–1383 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 20
mn.Alton, Staffordshire, England: Alton, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.23 August 1326–20 April 1383: 23 de agosto de 1326–20 de abril de 1383
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival nasceu em 23 de agosto de 1326, em Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Verdun, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Thomasine Dagworth. Ele faleceu em 20 de abril de 1383, em Espanha, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival родился 23 августа 1326 г. в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Verdun, 23. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Thomasine Dagworth. Он умер 20 апреля 1383 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности ворксоп, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.23 August 1326–20 April 1383: 23 de agosto de 1326–20 de abril de 1383
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Furnival 4th Baron Furnival nació el 23 de agosto de 1326, en Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Furnival 2nd Baron Furnival, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan de Verdun, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Thomasine Dagworth. Murió el 20 de abril de 1383, en España, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Worksop, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
